content: Add EXA_API_KEY + CREDENTIAL_ENCRYPTION_KEY to backend/.env and config.py
Create services/credential_service.py (encrypted Mongo key storage + env fallback)
Create integrations/exa_client.py (Exa Search API async client)
Refactor tavily_client.py, firecrawl_client.py, llm_client.py to use credential_service
Create services/search_orchestrator.py (Exa primary, Tavily fallback, pluggable)
Rewrite services/research_service.py: remove AI-knowledge fallback, strict no-data message
Update server.py /health, admin_routes.py /api-keys/status, misc_routes.py dashboard summary for Exa + credential_service
Frontend: ProductResultCard.js Sources tab Live Verified details
Lint backend + frontend, restart services, smoke test
Call testing_agent_v3 for backend+frontend regression + new flow validation
Fix any bugs from testing agent report
